segments.text: Large-scale identity programs demand speed, accuracy, and trust. For Aadhaar enrollment and national ID projects, every capture must meet the highest standards — without slowing operators down.
Introducing IriUniverse Two from BioEnable — an STQC certified dual iris scanner engineered for Aadhaar enrollment. A binocular design that subjects position easily, with minimal guidance.

Capture both irises in under one second. Images meet or exceed ISO nineteen seven ninety-four dash six. Automatic iris detection, built-in quality checks, and liveness detection help prevent spoofing.
No training required. Unaffected by ambient lighting. IP sixty-five dust and water resistant. Compliant with eye safety standards, ANSI, NIST, and ISO image interchange formats.
Deploy for voter registration, ID document issuance, law enforcement, large-scale enrollment, and e-KYC. Quick enrollment built for programs that register thousands — every day.
Lightweight under one kilogram. USB certified interface. Works on Windows, Linux, and Android. SDK available for integrators building custom enrollment solutions.
IriUniverse Two — identify, automate, track. Request your demo today at bioenabletech.com. BioEnable Technologies — your partner in trusted biometric enrollment.
